svg.title: Dating 2046 Futures Wheel
svg.desc: Three-ring futures wheel centered on dating industry's 2027-2030 de-monetization wall, with 5 STEEP-dimension Ring 1 nodes, 9 Ring 2 nodes, and 6 Ring 3 nodes tagged to Projected, Preferred, and Preposterous cones.
svg.text: Ring 1 colors = STEEP dimension. Ring 3 colors = Cone tag: blue Projected, green Preferred, red Preposterous, gray multi-cone.

g.text: ARPU collapse, EU AI Act liability, median user ages out of 20-35 window

svg.text: Connection Club artifact sits at intersection of Ring 3 nodes 3 (stratification) and 6 (aviation collapse + VR mediation) — Preposterous branch.
Solid lines = canonical parent-child. Dashed lines = secondary interaction noted in captions.
STEEP color key: purple=Tech+Social, teal=Environmental, pink=Political, amber=Economic, coral=Social.
Cone color key: blue=Projected, green=Preferred, red=Preposterous, gray=multi-cone.
